business.pricing: Rates are quoted after a brief intake call. St. John's Antique Appraisals supports antique appraisal needs across St. John's, NE.

content.about: St. John's Antique Appraisals provides professional antique appraisal services in the St. John's area with expertise in antique furniture, collectibles, fine art, and estate items. We offer thorough, accurate valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.
content.notes: St. John's Antique Appraisals serves St. John's, NE with antique appraisal support focused on Antique Furniture, Vintage Collectibles.

reviews.author: Jessica S.
reviews.content: Extremely professional and knowledgeable about antique valuation. The appraisal was thorough and delivered on time.

address.formatted: 606 Water St, St. John's, NL A1E 1B9

content.about: Garage 606 is a quaint St. John's establishment specializing in the evaluation and sale of unique collectibles and vintage items. Located on historic Water Street, they offer antique appraisal services in Newfoundland's capital.
content.notes: 606 Water St, St. John's, NL A1E 1B9.

content.about: Appraisal Services NL has been providing fair, unbiased market appraisals for over 40 years. Headquartered in St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, they specialize in antique and personal property valuations for the Avalon Peninsula and beyond.

Newfoundland Antique Gallery specializes in authentic Newfoundland and Maritime antiques, including fishing heritage items, folk art, and local collectibles. Located in St. John's, they offer professional appraisal services for the Avalon Peninsula.

East Coast Appraisals provides professional antique and personal property valuations in St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador. They serve the Avalon Peninsula and surrounding areas with estate, insurance, and donation appraisals.

Water Street Antiques is located on historic Water Street in downtown St. John's. They offer professional antique appraisals and specialize in Maritime antiques, folk art, and Newfoundland collectibles.
content.notes: Located on Water Street, St. John's, NL.
